title: Content Security Policy (CSP)
description: Architect Content Security Policies (CSP) to mitigate Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attacks. Design strict, nonce-based CSPs that maintain compatibility with modern frontend frameworks. Implement CSP reporting mechanisms to monitor and refine security policies.
objectives: Architect Content Security Policies (CSP) to mitigate Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) attacks.
Design strict, nonce-based CSPs that maintain compatibility with modern frontend frameworks.
Implement CSP reporting mechanisms to monitor and refine security policies.
